message:
Add theme integration helpers to lipgloss Style API

Extends the Style struct with comprehensive theme-aware methods that
enable declarative, design-system-based styling without manual color
lookup boilerplate.

Factory methods for theme-based styles:
- from_theme(theme, slot): Create style with foreground from theme slot
- from_theme_colors(theme, fg, bg): Create style with both fg/bg slots
- from_theme_role(theme, role): Create style from semantic role (Primary,
  Success, Warning, Error, Muted, Inverted)

Slot-based setters (chainable):
- foreground_slot(theme, slot): Set foreground from theme color slot
- background_slot(theme, slot): Set background from theme color slot
- border_foreground_slot(theme, slot): Set all border foreground colors
- border_background_slot(theme, slot): Set all border background colors

Theme preset styles (complete, ready-to-use):
- button_from_theme(theme): Primary button with padding, bold text
- error_from_theme(theme): Error message with bold red text
- muted_from_theme(theme): Secondary/muted text with italic
- selected_from_theme(theme): Highlighted selection row style
- panel_from_theme(theme): Bordered panel with rounded corners

These helpers work with the new Theme and ColorSlot types from the
theme module, enabling consistent color usage across an application
while keeping the familiar Style builder pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
